questionHtml: Calculate the volume, in cm3, of the bag.
markschemeHtml:
36 × 9 ×12     (M1)

Note: Award (M1) for correct substitution into volume of cuboid formula.

 

= 3890 (cm3)  (3888 (cm3))       (A1)(G2)

 

[2 marks]
